title: Ethoslab Horse
description: Literally just turns Canadian Youtuber Ethoslab into a horse, replaces the black horse.
body:
This resource pack will add the legendary Ethoslab as a horse for anyone to ride around.
The pack will also remove the outer patterns on some horses however it was getting in the way of Etho and the sacrifice had to be made.
This should work on any version of MineCraft that has horses in it even if the pack gives you a warning for the wrong version.
Have fun and remember to feed Etho every now and then!
